description:
No spec subject (epic groups stages; each stage carries its own Advances:)

Jira: TBD
(Jira MCP unavailable at /distill time — record TBD; PR-creation hook should backfill.)

Distilled from mega-plan run 20260513-083104-claude.
Plan source: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/plans/-Users-mz-dev-mz-my_ai/2026-05-13-test-faithfulness-verifier/runs/20260513-083104-claude/05-refined-plan.md
Spec dir: .spec/

The library was renamed from the plan-era `verify_tests` to `mutagen_ex`. All
module paths, mix task names, and test paths in the stage tickets use the new
naming:
- `mix verify_tests` → `mix mutagen`
- `VerifyTests.*` → `MutagenEx.*`
- `Mix.Tasks.VerifyTests` → `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen`
- `lib/verify_tests/` → `lib/mutagen_ex/`
- `test/verify_tests/` → `test/mutagen_ex/`

The S2 spike is GATING: a negative outcome on any of the 4 fixture modules
or the 100-iteration loop escalates to the user (fallback architecture
decision needed). Do not silently pivot.

Verification command: `mix test` (strict pre-merge: `mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test`).

Stage children correspond to the refined plan's S1-S8 (S0 is planning-side
and not actionable in this repo). Parallelism notes are in each stage's
"Depends on" field.

ORCHESTRATED
Children closed: 10 (mutagen-wrd.1 through mutagen-wrd.10)
BOUNCEs encountered: 3
  - mutagen-wrd.6: audit BOUNCE → implementer (r2 filter-before-validate ordering test, r5 empty-module-warning exclusivity); resolved iter 2.
  - mutagen-wrd.7: audit BOUNCE → implementer (r7 snapshot-growth direct test coverage; auditor's bw comment was malformed and the orchestrator relayed the verdict); resolved iter 2.
  - mutagen-wrd.9: audit BOUNCE → implementer (silent weakening — 5 @tag :skip scenarios masking production gaps + missing mutator coverage + missing golden compare); resolved iter 3 with 7 in-scope items + 5 discovery tickets filed.
User escalations: 0
Crash/respawn events: 2
  - mutagen-wrd.8: audit agent crashed with API ConnectionRefused mid-run, respawned cleanly and approved.
  - mutagen-wrd.9: impl iter 1 stalled at 600s with no progress, respawned recovery iter 2 with WIP preserved.

Discovery tickets surfaced (open, future work — NOT part of this epic's deliverables):
  - mutagen-wrd.11 [BUG] TestSelector emits `exclude: [:test]` for file-cited targets
  - mutagen-wrd.12 [BUG] `mix mutagen` passes hardcoded `test_modules: []` to MutationRunner
  - mutagen-wrd.13 [BUG] MutationLoop `Task.shutdown(:brutal_kill)` corrupts Code.Server load locks
  - mutagen-wrd.14 infinite_looper.ex uses `:arith` trigger; spec named `:case_drop`
  - mutagen-wrd.15 [BUG] Literal mutator does not match parsed AST (token_metadata wraps literals)

Final state:
  - Epic branch `epic/mutagen-wrd` at 57e1b66 (10 stage commits + bootstrap)
  - Smoke green: mix compile --warnings-as-errors + mix test → 305 tests, 0 failures (default suite under 60s); mix test --only e2e_slow → 11 pass, 2 honest skips with bw refs
  - Epic worktree preserved at /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-mutagen-wrd
  - No remote configured; epic-branch → main PR is a deliberate human checkpoint — orchestrator did NOT push or open a PR.

The mix mutagen pipeline is fully wired and tested. Five discovery tickets capture the production gaps the E2E surfaced for follow-up work.

Planned ordering (no explicit blocked_by between tickets, but file-overlap risk
on test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs between .11 and .12 — running .11 first,
.12 after; .13/.14/.15 are independent):

- .14 (spec clarification or mutator refinement) joins when a slot opens

ORCHESTRATOR: subticket added during pipeline.

mutagen-wrd.15's implementer surfaced a follow-on issue while wiring up the
__block__-wrapper resolution: the original ticket's hypothesis (parser wraps
atomic literals when token_metadata: true) does NOT hold in Elixir 1.19.5 for
decisions.ex (literals there are bare children of operator/clause-head tuples
with no metadata). The __block__-wrapper code .15 implemented is correct and
verified end-to-end with a hand-built wrapped AST, but the decisions.ex floor
needs an enumerator-level parent-line-inheritance pass.

Filed as mutagen-wrd.16 (DISCOVERY: Literal mutator floor on decisions.ex needs
enumerator parent-line-inheritance) — Advances: mutagen.mutation_enumeration.
This is NOT a blocker for .15 (different file, different mechanism); the e2e
Scenario 2a @tag :skip remains until .16 lands.

Scope-expansion counter: 1/3 this run.
